Usage: audit-tool [OPTIONS]

Options:
  -h, --help                         show help
  -u USER, --user USER               authorized username to test
  -L FILE, --user-list FILE          read authorized usernames from file
  -p SECRET, --password SECRET       authorized password or token
  -s PORT, --port PORT               target service port
  --rate NUMBER                      maximum attempts per minute
  --dry-run                          print command without running
  --notes FILE                       operator notes file
